response.original_title: POMPEI: BELOW THE CLOUDS | Making of the Score with Daniel Blumberg
response.overview: A short film capturing Academy Award winner Daniel Blumberg’s creative process as he composes the score for Gianfranco Rosi’s POMPEI: BELOW THE CLOUDS. Shot onsite at London’s Café OTO, the film features intimate performances by John Butcher and Seymour Wright, offering a rare look into the soundscape behind Rosi’s Venice-award winning film.
response.title: POMPEI: BELOW THE CLOUDS | Making of the Score with Daniel Blumberg
